subcodes.first_line: O thou learned one in the school of divine love! Thy letter was received and its contents became known. Instructions were [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان محبت الله مکتوبت واصل و مضمون معلوم شد دستورالعملی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
